queueSettings.subtitle: Fixed posting times for each platform.

notice.body: Queue slots are templates. They do not publish or schedule content automatically yet - use them as reusable posting times when you plan content manually.

form.duplicateSlot: This slot already exists for this platform.

notice.body: These settings store defaults and templates per platform. They don't connect OAuth accounts, don't auto-publish, and don't create platform accounts. Publishing stays manual-first until official integrations land.

error.title: Couldn't load platform settings
error.fallback: We couldn't reach the API just now.

empty.title: No platform settings yet.
empty.description: Settings will be created automatically the first time you load this page.

card.enabledDescription: Show this platform in content workflows.
card.footerNote: Defaults & templates only - no OAuth yet

form.publishModeHint: Stored only - used as default by future workflows.

form.tagPlaceholder: Type a tag and press Enter

youtube.futurePlan: Add official YouTube Data API v3 with OAuth and a token refresh loop.

instagram.summary: Short vertical clips and visual content.
instagram.futurePlan: Onboard a Meta app, link an Instagram Professional account, request graph permissions.

tiktok.futurePlan: Revisit TikTok Content Posting API once approval is realistic; otherwise stay manual.

facebook.futurePlan: Reuse the Meta app from Instagram and target a specific Facebook Page.

roadmap.title: Integration roadmap
roadmap.description: The order we expect real platform integrations to land. Dates aren't promised - manual workflow stays the default until each one ships.

youtube.title: YouTube official integration
youtube.description: OAuth + YouTube Data API v3 for auto-publishing.

meta.title: Meta integration for Facebook & Instagram
meta.description: Single Meta app handles both Pages and Instagram Professional accounts.

tiktok.title: TikTok official API research
tiktok.description: Validate TikTok approval flow before committing to an integration.

analytics.title: Analytics across platforms
analytics.description: Pull post-level performance once each integration lands.

targetPlatforms.description: Pick where this will live. Each platform gets its own draft.
